source_pr.title: infoschema: migrate test-infra to testify
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #28319

### Release note

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select query_time, conn_id from `CLUSTER_SLOW_QUERY` order by time limit 1").Check(testkit.Rows("4.895492 6")) (infoschema/cluster_tables_serial_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select query_time, conn_id from `CLUSTER_SLOW_QUERY` order by time limit 1").Check(testkit.Rows("4.895492 6")) (infoschema/cluster_tables_serial_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test suite was flaky due to legacy go-check based test infrastructure and suite refactoring needs in infoschema. This PR stabilizes it by migrating infoschema tests to testify/require and restructuring suite setup (including TestMain), reducing framework-related setup/teardown issues and improving determinism of the test harness.
fix_pattern: Migrate infoschema test suites from go-check to testify and standard Go testing patterns to make suite setup/teardown more reliable and reduce infra-migration-induced flakes.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select query_time, conn_id from `CLUSTER_SLOW_QUERY` order by time limit 1").Check(testkit.Rows("4.895492 6")) (infoschema/cluster_tables_serial_test.go)

files: infoschema/cache_test.go, infoschema/cluster_tables_serial_test.go, infoschema/infoschema_test.go, infoschema/main_test.go, infoschema/metrics_schema_test.go, infoschema/tables_serial_test.go, infoschema/tables_test.go, testkit/testkit.go
